items.title: Solana, Hyperliquid ETFs dominate altcoin fund flows despite flying under the radar
items.whyYouShouldCare: The influx of capital into Solana and Hyperliquid ETFs indicates growing investor interest, which could enhance liquidity and market positioning for SOL.

items.title: Jito rolls out JTX self-custodial trading platform for Solana tokens and RWAs
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jito's launch of the JTX platform enhances the usability of Solana tokens and real-world assets, potentially driving ecosystem growth and user engagement.

items.title: Allbridge Pauses Cross-Chain Protocol After $1.65M Flash Loan Attack
items.whyYouShouldCare: Allbridge's pause following a flash loan attack highlights vulnerabilities in cross-chain protocols, impacting trust and operational stability within the Solana ecosystem.
